title: Take a Chance
writer: Nacio Herb Brown, Buddy G. DeSylva, Laurence Schwab
actors: James Dunn, June Knight, Lillian Roth
plot: From a team 2 girls and 2 not-straight men, a girl leaves to be a star, other stays to keep the boys straight. The star comes back with a producer, who falls in love with the girl who stayed. There are hurdles, the 2 men, and her ...
